name: Classical pilasters
description: Wider pilaster spacing of @secondary — sober temple or basilica feel.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.wall_pilasters_classical.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
